title: eremophila dalyana
intro: Eremophila dalyana is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae, commonly known as the bushflower, and is native to Australia. The plant is known to have medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and stems, which contain compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Eremophila dalyana include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. Eremophila dalyana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional Australian medicine.
